english_translation: It's pretty good, it's just that the road to get to this place is indeed not very good.

text: tiket termasuk mahal kalo hanya hiking dengan fasilitas yang mulai usang baiknya ada perhatian pengelola supaya pengunjung punya kesan yang mendalam bukan hanya daper lelah dan jalan licin saja
english_translation: The ticket is quite expensive if it's just for hiking with facilities that are starting to be outdated. It would be good for the management to pay attention so that visitors have a deep impression, not just get tired and walk on slippery paths.

text: tempatnya enak buat liburan bersama keluarga teman sahabat pacar banyak spot spot foto yang bagus ada perahu dayung perahu bebek perahu ikan ada sepeda ada becak ada kereta api buat makan bareng keluarga mantap
english_translation: The place is nice for a vacation with family, friends, buddies, and a partner. There are many good photo spots, paddle boats, duck boats, fish boats, bicycles, trishaws, and a train. Great for eating together with the family.

text: tempatnya seru sayangnya parkir pas keluar mesti bayar lagi tidak allin ternyata
english_translation: The place is fun, too bad parking has to be paid for again when leaving, it's not all-inclusive.

text: curugnya keren tapi buat arah pulangnya sangat menyiksa buat yang sakit jantung harap urungkan niat ke sini
english_translation: The waterfall is cool, but the way back is very torturous. Those with heart conditions, please reconsider coming here.

text: belum terlalu banyak wahana main untuk anaknya food courtnya kurang menarik dan pagi belum pada buka tempatnya besar enak untuk dipakai bersantai adem
english_translation: Not too many rides for the child, the food court is not very attractive and not many places are open in the morning. The place is large and nice for relaxing, it's cool.

text: petualangan pemandangan gunung dengan banyak peternakan di gunung burangrang kbb
english_translation: Mountain scenery adventure with many farms on Mount Burangrang KBB

text: tak pernah bosan untuk kembali lagi kesini menikmati hembusan angin dan gemuruh suara air yang mengalir deras
english_translation: Never tired of coming back here to enjoy the breeze and the roar of the flowing water

text: view pemandangan mantab kalau kesini antara pagi sampai siang karena akses jalan menuju ke sana sangat macet dan petunjuk jalan kurang pakai google maps sering bingung kasih petunjuk mungkin bisa tanyakan penduduk sekitar di sana banyak yang jual merchandise untuk oleh-oleh
english_translation: The view is amazing if you come here between morning and noon because the access road to get there is very jammed and the road signs are lacking. Using Google Maps often causes confusion with directions, maybe you can ask the locals. There are many who sell merchandise as souvenirs.

text: aku belum pernah ke sini ini vidionya di masukkan di tv magna tv
english_translation: I've never been here, this video is put on Magna TV.

text: seru banget main disini tempat cukup luas sangat cocok untuk kegiatan gathering dengan teman kantor banyak kegiatan outbound yang bisa dilakukan walaupun sayang pada akhirnya hujan jadi tidak bisa explore lebih jauh main flying foxnya bikin nagih
english_translation: So much fun playing here, the place is quite spacious and very suitable for office gathering activities. There are many outbound activities that can be done, although it's a shame it rained at the end, so we couldn't explore further. Playing flying fox is addictive.

text: pemandangan saat naik ke titik puncak itu indah meski untuk turun kembali agak seram
english_translation: The view while climbing to the peak is beautiful, although going back down is a bit scary.

text: lumayan liburan ke sana menyenangkan ada outbound tali gantung panjat tebing dan playing fox banyak spot buat bertoto juga suasana sejuk dan segar karena di kelilingi hutan pinus banyak tempat penginapan dari tenda sampai kayak penginapan elit ada restorannya juga lumayan masakannya
english_translation: Quite enjoyable holiday there, fun activities like rope games, rock climbing, and zip-lining, with many photo spots. The atmosphere is cool and refreshing, surrounded by pine forests. There are many accommodation options, from tents to luxury inns. They also have a restaurant with decent food.

text: bagus alam sejuk asri area camp yang luas spot poto bagus area yang bersih
english_translation: Beautiful cool natural environment, spacious camping area, good photo spots, clean area

text: belum sempat masuk terlalu ramai pengunjung kemarin liburan 15-16 mei 2022
english_translation: Didn't have time to go in, too many visitors yesterday during the holiday on May 15-16, 2022

text: gang masuknya agak kecil pas-pasan 2 mobil dalamnya luas hijau banyak spot berfoto bayar masuk 30 0 orang tidak termasuk mainan di dalam tetapi tiket bisa ditukar dengan minuman
english_translation: The entrance is a bit small, barely fits 2 cars. The interior is spacious and green with many photo spots. The entrance fee is 30,000 (currency not specified, likely Indonesian Rupiah) per person, not including toys inside. However, the ticket can be exchanged for a drink.

text: buat ngelatih anak-anak belajar hiking belajar menyukai alam tempat ini cocok banget seru juga ada banyak air terjun buat family camping juga bagus tempat outboundnya ada lebih atas lagi youtube channel abiyaka activity
english_translation: To train children to learn hiking and love nature, this place is very suitable. It's also fun with many waterfalls. It's also good for family camping. The outbound area is further up. YouTube channel Abiyaka Activity.

text: good luck banget buat hiking jalur jalannya lumayan di beberapa titik banyak kamar mandi yang memudahkan untuk buang air besar saran kalau mau lebih privasi jangan datang di akhir pekan
english_translation: Good luck with your hike, the trail is quite manageable. There are plenty of bathrooms at several points which makes it convenient for bowel movements. A suggestion for more privacy: don't come on the weekend.

text: 7 mei 2022 touring bari mudik mntap perjalanan sungguh menangtang namun terbayar dengan indahnya pemandang yang di suguhkan sampai pulang kesorean saking asyiknya di jalan
english_translation: May 7, 2022 touring Bari. Mudik (going home for Eid) was great. The journey was truly challenging, but it was paid off with the beautiful scenery that was presented. Arrived home in the late afternoon because I was so engrossed on the road.

text: tempat yang asik buat refreshing walaupun cuaca panas udara tetap sejuk karena ada di dataran yang cukup tinggi permainan buat anak juga cocok menyenangkan
english_translation: A cool place for refreshing, even though the weather is hot, the air is still cool because it's on a high plateau. Games for children are also suitable and fun.

text: salah satu destinasi wisata di daerah lembang dengan menyuguhkan pemandangan yang indah danau dan hamparan bukit yang indah disertai spot selfie dan banyak wahana pelayanan karyawan juga ramah dan prima
english_translation: One of the tourist destinations in the Lembang area, offering beautiful views of the lake and vast, picturesque hills, complete with selfie spots and many attractions. The employee service is also friendly and excellent.

text: salah satu karya sang pecipta tapi sayang banyak yang berjualan yang selalu mengikuti sampai kita kembali kemobil
english_translation: One of the creator's works, but unfortunately many are selling and always follow us until we return to the car.

text: tempatnya yang strategis mudah dijangkau alamnya terasa sejuk dan nyaman banyak wahana yang tersedia
english_translation: The place is strategically located and easy to reach, the nature feels cool and comfortable, and there are many attractions available.

text: mantap untuk refreshing udara sejuk bikin mata segar dan pikiran kembali normal
english_translation: Great for refreshing, the cool air makes your eyes feel fresh and your mind get back to normal.

text: temoat penginapan dengan konsep alam hutan pinus cocok untuk liburan keluarga atau ada acara gathering kantor sekolah harga terjangkau 1 265 0 malam 6 orang tersedia beberapa tipe kamar ada breakfastnya juga ada beberapa wahana bermain dan kasih makan rusa dan kelinci
english_translation: Staycation with a pine forest nature concept, suitable for family holidays or office/school gatherings. Affordable price: 1,265,000 per night for 6 people. Several room types are available, breakfast is included, and there are also several playgrounds and opportunities to feed deer and rabbits.

text: banyak batu seperti jaman purbakala di sini bagus untuk foto-foto sambil hiking
english_translation: Many ancient-like stones here are good for photos while hiking.

text: tempatnya sejuk alami bnged spot buat foto juga banyak cocok untuk healing bersama keluarga atau pasangan untuk tiket masuk 50rb cukup wort itu lah dengan suasananya dan cukup luas juga
english_translation: The place is naturally very cool, lots of photo spots too, suitable for healing with family or a partner. For the entrance ticket of 50,000, it's quite worth it considering the atmosphere and it's quite spacious too.

text: tempat outbound yang seru dengan pemandangan yang oke dan udara sejuk dari segi harga juga tidak mahal kalau dari arah jakarta lebih baik ambil jalan dari subang karena macet banget kalo dari arah bandung kota
english_translation: An exciting outbound location with a nice view and cool air. The price is also not expensive. If coming from Jakarta, it's better to take the route via Subang because it's very jammed if coming from the Bandung city direction.
